welcome_offer.description: Earn 125,000 bonus points after you spend $6,000 in purchases in the first 3 months from account opening.

other_benefits.name: Priority Pass Select
other_benefits.description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select Membership for lounge access.

other_benefits.name: Sapphire Lounge Network
other_benefits.description: Access to Chase Sapphire Lounges by The Club.

other_benefits.name: Reserve Travel Designer
other_benefits.description: Personalized service valued at up to $300 per trip.

other_benefits.name: Points Transfer
other_benefits.description: 1 to 1 value to leading airline and hotel partners.

recurring_credits.name: Annual Travel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $300 annual credit for travel purchases (airfare, hotels, car rentals). Automatically applied as statement credit.

recurring_credits.name: Dining Credit
recurring_credits.description: $300/year ($150/6 months) for dining at Sapphire Exclusive Tables via OpenTable. Must book via Chase.

recurring_credits.name: The Edit Hotel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $500 annual credit ($250 x 2 stays) for prepaid hotel bookings via The Edit by Chase Travel. 2-night minimum.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 every 4 years for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS application fee.

recurring_credits.name: Priority Pass Membership
recurring_credits.description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select membership with 1,300+ airport lounges worldwide. Includes 2 guests.
